title: 睇外國新聞建議睇Sky News Australia

replies.msg:
基本上大部份香港人識既英美媒體例如BBC CNN NBC ABC Guardian Sky News ITV Channel 4都係偏左至左膠。係抹黑trump trump同宣傳黑人命貴上不遺餘力


但呢個Sky News Australia 不得止直線屌鳩中國，仲屌埋Black Lives Matter, Biden 同埋充斥住西方社會既左膠


好難得集兩家大成，連英國自己Sky News都係不斷洗腦植入左膠思想。我都唔明點解澳洲個邊咁大膽。而且香港蘋果啲國際新聞都係偏左膠路線(另加係咁植入大陸字眼洗你腦)。


所以好少有媒體可以做到咁好。建議大家訂閱佢地YouTube channel 支持下。當練下聽下英文都好，而且佢哋澳洲口音未至於重到聽唔明。

youtube.com/user/SkyNewsAustralia


關於中國既新聞

https://youtu.be/Ri4NBy_PrGI

china just sent a chilling message to the rest of the world
https://youtu.be/xUsntuFS3EY


It’s now ‘game on’ between Beijing and the west
https://youtu.be/FoJwA_-VGvU


The tensions between Taiwan and China are dangerous and should be seen as such
https://youtu.be/CAhWcCiTD-g

We may soon be in grave danger from China with Biden in charge: Bolt
https://youtu.be/PErTNo2XYxU

Laptop evidence strongly indicates Joe Biden is compromised on China
https://youtu.be/g4gXUp-kH4M

The leader of the western world is cognitively deficient
https://youtu.be/V43JwzZ_ALs
仲有好多好多冇擺上嚟，大家去YouTube search Sky News Australia 支持下
